calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-22-2016 Off Calendar

Request For Default Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Dec-13-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: A. Mok. Proceedings reported by: Mitch Lyon, CSR#6840.

Milton Katz, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, ALAN MANDUJANO, sworn and examined.
No appearance by defaulted defendants MACAN PACIFIC INC. and COMMONWEALTH LAND TITLE COMPANY,
Default of Defendants has been duly entered.
Court ordered Defendants Does 1-15 dismissed without prejudice.

Plaintiff's Exhibit:
1-1st Amended complaint 3/3/2016
2-Deed of Trust
3-Documents (multipage)
Court returned all exhibits to Plaintiff.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendants as follows:

411 Vienna Street, San Francisco, California and legally described:

"Beginning at a point on the southeasterly line of Vienna street, distant thereon 100 feet southwesterly from the southwesterly line of Brazil Avenue; running thence southwesterly along said line of Vienna Street 25 feet; thence at a right angle southeasterly 100 feet; thence at a right angle northeasterly 25 feet; thence at a right angle northwesterly 100 feet to the point of beginning.

Being a portion of Block No. 64, Excelsior Homestead Association.
Assessor's Lot 40; Block 6076"

is extinguished pursuant to Section 882.020 of the California civil Code.

Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-23-2016 Continued To Jan-11-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Off Calendar Aug-01-2016 Continued To Oct-12-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
